utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists five items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan chosen by the AI assistant lists 'HealthFirst Standard Plan3' as the main package, which bundles health, property, and travel coverage. The ground-truth ratings include 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' (rating 7 for physical health, 6 for mental health). Since the plan name matches closely (Plan3 likely being a variant of the same plan), I map it to the HealthFirst Standard Plan. The property coverage and travel coverage are indicated as included within the same plan, so they are part of this bundled product. Therefore, the relevant rating comes from 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' entries. There are no separate ratings for property or travel coverage under HealthFirst, so only the existing ratings for HealthFirst Standard Plan (7 and 6) are applicable. Additional services are not a separately rated product but rather part of the plan package.
